Tier2.label: tier_2
Tier2.description: Standard durability - balanced performance and consistency

Tier3.label: tier_3
Tier3.description: Cache-only - no durability guarantees, reconstructed on restart

compliance_rules.tier_durability_mapping: MUST - Each tier MUST use its assigned durability mode
compliance_rules.replay_support_tier1_tier2: MUST - Tier1 and Tier2 classes MUST support replay
compliance_rules.replay_support_tier3: MUST NOT - Tier3 classes MUST NOT support replay
compliance_rules.unique_domains: MUST - Each domain MUST be unique across all persistence classes
compliance_rules.unique_tables: MUST - Each table name MUST be unique across all persistence classes
compliance_rules.module_ownership: SHOULD - Each persistence class SHOULD have a clear owner module
compliance_rules.replay_strategy_specification: MUST - Classes with replay_support=true MUST specify replay strategy
